what_changed.summary: Core RL training pipeline refactored: reward shaping extracted into composable components, DQN agent modernized with configurable epsilon schedules, and environment wrapper simplified.

zone_details.title: Training Pipeline
zone_details.description: Entry point simplified; deprecated MetricsCollector import removed. Training loop now uses new reward API.

zone_details.title: Environment
zone_details.description: Reward shaping function refactored from monolithic to composable components (paddle proximity, ball trajectory, survival bonus).

what_changed.summary: CI workflow updated to include radon complexity checks. Pre-commit hook now enforces maximum cyclomatic complexity of 10 per function.

zone_details.title: Repo Infrastructure
zone_details.description: Added radon complexity gate to factory.yaml CI workflow.

decision.title: Extract reward components into pure functions
decision.rationale: Reduce cyclomatic complexity and improve testability of reward shaping
decision.body:
The monolithic shape_reward() function was split into three pure functions: paddle_proximity_reward(), ball_trajectory_reward(), and survival_bonus(). Each can be unit-tested independently and composed via a simple sum.

This follows the SRP principle and makes it possible to A/B test individual reward components during training experiments.

files.change: Split shape_reward() into 3 composable pure functions
Added per-component tests for each reward function

post_merge_item.title: Verify reward shaping doesn't regress training convergence
post_merge_item.description: The reward function refactoring preserves the same mathematical output but changes the code structure. The training pipeline should be re-run to verify convergence speed hasn't regressed.
post_merge_item.failure_scenario: Training takes 2x longer to converge due to subtle numerical differences in reward computation order
post_merge_item.success_scenario: Training convergence matches or improves vs. baseline (within 5% episode count)
